view_meta: the ASA-style policy engine — autonomy mode & honest posture, rules-as-data, the graduation ladder, and the decision log (authZ metadata only, no secrets · TG-94).
purpose: POLICY surface (record domain, epic TG-94/TG-106): the operator window onto the ASA-style Policy Engine, rendered LIVE from the read-only /v1/policy/{mode,rules,graduation,decisions} read surface (spec/015 T-015-12). Four honest sections plus a deferred tracer — (1) mode & posture: a prominent card color-coded by the active autonomy mode (Shadow/HITL=read-only safe, Semi-auto/Full-auto=warn) rendering the API's own honest booleans (may_auto_actuate / requires_human_vote / persisted) and the worker's live mutation-gate posture; the mode-change control is a DISABLED, clearly-labeled placeholder for the gated admin write; (2) ASA rules: the active rules-as-data as an ordered, top-down, deny-overrides access-list — per-rule verdict badge (allow/approve/deny), selector (host/glob/group/device-class), op-class, params (band_mode, min_confidence, rate_limit), approve_by, reversibility, and the fail-closed default row; editing is a disabled sealed-write placeholder; (3) graduation ladder: per-op-class level (approve|auto) + clean-run progress toward promotion (against the engine's default threshold, honestly labeled) + last-outcome chip — the earned-autonomy view; (4) decision log: the recent policy_decision audit table (rule_id, verdict, composed band, min-confidence, mode, time) with a ?limit= selector honored. The packet-tracer ('may TG act on host X?', TG-105) is rendered as a truthful coming-soon placeholder because the live trace needs a worker-side Decide endpoint that does not exist yet — no fabricated verdict.
notes: Honesty contract: NO fixture — every value is fetched live at session adoption. Unauthenticated shows only the auth gate; authenticated, an unavailable endpoint (503 fail-closed) renders an honest error state and an empty spine an honest empty state, never a fabricated row (INV-15). Sealed values never appear (INV-13): the payload carries only non-secret authZ metadata (modes, verdicts, bands, op-classes, selectors, counts) and the surface has no control that requests or displays key material, argv, or host credential. Disabled write-controls (mode change, rule edit) are clearly marked and never fake-functional; the packet-tracer is a labeled deferred placeholder. Reuses the console design system verbatim: chip-ok/chip-warn/chip-bad outcome semantics, the map-vs-territory plane language (map=indigo for the AI/auto, territory=steel for observed ground truth), wrapcard/tbl/sec/empty components, and the same theme tokens — no new palette. Tables live in their own overflow-x:auto container so the page body never scrolls sideways. Live state (liveState.policyMode/policyRules/policyGraduation/policyDecisions) is populated by modules/_live/js.txt liveAdopt(); the decision-log limit selector re-fetches and re-renders in place.
verified: assemble.py rebuild byte-clean; node --check on the extracted bundle passes; hash-route #policy registers and all four sections + the deferred tracer render (loading/empty/error/dark states exercised against a stubbed API via Playwright).
